message:
fix(tree-shake): detect TypeScript bundles via createSourceFile

The previous trigger (__edgebox_intercept_tsc_factory) was defined BY
tsc.js, not used by TypeScript bundles, so tsc.js was never included.

Now triggers on createSourceFile which appears 10+ times in TypeScript
bundles, enabling the native node registration hooks.

Verified: tsc.js now appears in runtime globals when compiling TSC.
